scope.summary: DRCP session identity is cleared before optional identity application, including the no-identity path; the live fixture proves principal A cannot bleed into principal B on reused sessions.
out_of_scope: Live DRCP execution requires the operator's DRCP-enabled Oracle lane.

entry_points.name: DRCP identity regression test
entry_points.trace: The live_oracle fixture seeds profile A, releases it, reacquires profile B with no identity, requires physical SID reuse, and rejects all A tags.

limitations: The DRCP fixture was not run because no live DRCP lane was available in this turn.
